name: list_course_reviews
description: Fetch user reviews and ratings for a specific Udemy course. Returns a paginated list of reviews including the reviewer name, rating, content, and creation date. Useful for evaluating course quality and understanding student experiences.

parameters.name: course_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the course.

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Number of reviews per page (max 100, default 12).

parameters.name: fields[course_review]
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of review fields to include.

results.content: Excellent course! Very thorough coverage of machine learning concepts with practical examples.
